caption: Sweep routers: the cavalry sweeper holds on the closer Holdout while nothing is routing, switches onto the farther Fleeing infantry the moment it starts routing (~tick 55-60), then reverts to Holdout once Fleeing is run down and annihilated (~tick 85-90). This PR fixes the demo's own caption and state-dump ticks (previously sampled at ticks that missed the switch entirely) to actually show that middle phase.
